selection_reason: WP1 ProofPacket contract and closure review were complete; WP2 is the next highest-priority unblocked source-only dependency and directly closes the carried E2 concern that proof provenance needed named PIT dataset, rebuild, feature/schema, matched-control, and row-backed fill source evidence.
preconditions: WP1 recovery state and chain closure committed
PIT manifest selected before registry/advisory metadata hardening
runtime/order-capable work remains blocked by expired standing Demo authorization
dirty worktree classified and unrelated memory/* left untouched
acceptance: Define pit_dataset_manifest_v1 schema version, canonical field, validator result, hash function, and extractor.

Validator requires explicit as_of_ts, point-in-time flag, future-data denial, candidate scope, source query window/hash, row-set hash, feature lineage, label lineage, split lineage, leakage evidence, matched controls, row-backed fill source, rebuild evidence, provenance, and manifest hash.
Unpinned now()/CURRENT_TIMESTAMP/latest/max_age_days query shape is research-only, not dataset-ready.
Builder is stdlib-only and consumes only caller-provided source mappings and synthetic rows; it does not read env, DB, files, runtime, network, or exchange state.
ProofPacket cross-binds PIT manifest candidate_scope to packet candidate_identity.
ProofPacket blocks authority aliases such as order_allowed, promotion_allowed, live_enabled, cost_gate_lower_allowed, and runtime_write_allowed.
NO_MATCHED_FILLS remains a blocker artifact and does not require PIT manifest.
Focused, adjacent, and cost-gate proof tests pass.
No runtime, DB, exchange, MCP, secret, order/probe, Cost Gate, deploy, live, or mainnet action is performed.
kill_gates: STOP_TEST if focused or adjacent tests fail
STOP_EVIDENCE if PIT manifest cannot be machine-checkable or ProofPacket provenance remains generic
STOP_BOUNDARY if runtime/order/private/MCP/live action is required
